title: A Resolution approving and adopting the Municipal Disaster Risk Reduction and Management Council Resolution No. 2025-10 dated September 24, 2025 entitled "Resolution approving the Municipal Disaster Risk Reduction and Management Fund of the Municipal Government of Los Baños for CY 2026 amounting to Twenty-Nine Million Two Hundred Sixty Two Thousand Seven Hundred Sixty-Eight Pesos and 86/100 (Php 29,262,768.86).
